name: Alchemist
summary: Smart and resourceful, the alchemist crafts alchemical items—such as bombs, elixirs, and poisons—that they use to defeat foes and aid allies.

name: Animist
summary: Animists gain magical spells from spirits called apparitions that they attune to, choosing new apparitions as the circumstances demand.

name: Barbarian
summary: The barbarian is a fearsome embodiment of rage, unleashing the unstoppable power of their fury against anyone who stands in their way.

name: Bard
summary: An artist and a scholar, the bard uses performance and esoteric learning to bolster their companions and foil their enemies.

name: Champion
summary: Wielding a weapon of their faith, the champion fights for a cause espoused by their deity. Champions can be vastly different depending on their cause and deity

name: Cleric
summary: The cleric is dedicated to the worship of a single deity and draws divine magic from this devotion. Clerics can be vastly different depending on their deity

name: Commander
summary: The commander is a battlefield leader whose clever use of tactics and knowledge of war can turn the tide of any fight

name: Druid
summary: The druid walks the wild, primordial places of the world without fear, harnessing the primal magic of nature and controlling it with calm purpose.

name: Exemplar
summary: Exemplars channel a spark of divine power through sacred relics called ikons and draw power from the epithets they build for themselves.

name: Fighter
summary: Fighting for honor, greed, loyalty, or simply the thrill of battle, fighters are an undisputed masters of weaponry and combat techniques

name: Guardian
summary: The guardian is a defensive combatant who focuses on squeezing every last drop of protection from their armor.

name: Gunslinger
summary: While most people can fire a gun or crossbow, a gunslinger knows such weapons better than anyone.

name: Inventor
summary: Any tinkerer can follow a diagram to make a device, but the inventor creates the impossible and challenges the boundaries of reality.

name: Investigator
summary: Clever and insightful, the investigator solves mysteries and teems with knowledge. In battle, they play out every possibility in advance.

name: Kineticist
summary: The power of the elements flows from within every Kineticist. A kinetic gate inextricably tied to their bodies channel power directly from the elemental planes

name: Magus
summary: The magus, a polymath of battle, trains in both spells and strikes. Combining these arts, a magus channels spells into their weapon for a devastating strike

name: Monk
summary: The monk seeks perfection in all things, including using their body as the perfect weapon.

name: Oracle
summary: The oracle is a paradox of divine magic, able to tap into energies that both grant potent revelations and curse them

name: Psychic
summary: Guided by the personal combination of their subconscious and conscious mind, a psychic calls forth occult magic with but a thought.

name: Ranger
summary: Resourceful and cunning, the ranger is a hunter, tracker, and warrior who preserves the natural world and protects civilization from its ravages.

name: Rogue
summary: Cunning and quick, the rogue brings skill and expertise few of their comrades can match. In battle, they excel at sneak attacks and ambushes.

name: Sorcerer
summary: The intense magic the sorcerer commands comes from neither study nor worship — it comes from their blood. They're born with power of their heritage.

name: Summoner
summary: A summoner acts as the living anchor to a powerful being called an eidolon, which they call upon for aid.

name: Swashbuckler
summary: To a swashbuckler, anything worth doing is worth doing with style. This dynamic daredevil performs flamboyant attacks and bold feats of derring-do.

name: Thaumaturge
summary: The thaumaturge has seen every monster and knows every secret. Supplementing their skill at arms and ability to strike a monster's weakness.

name: Witch
summary: The witch is a versatile spellcaster who learns their magic from a familiar, sent to them by a powerful and mysterious patron.

name: Wizard
summary: The wizard is the arcane master of spellcasting, plucking incredible power from reality through complicated spell formulas.
